domain: Berber/Amazigh zerda + marabout pilgrimage system (Maghreb/North Africa): marabouts = saint shrines; Seven Saints of Marrakesh annual ziyara pilgrimage over 7 days; per-saint specialization (healing/fertility/protection — pilgrim chooses by need); maârouf life-event ceremony (first haircut newborn) at marabout shrine; pre-Islamic Berber custom fused with Islamic dhikr (Sufi trance); ahouach collective dance post-ceremony.
specific_mechanism: BERBER-ZERDA-7-MARABOUT-DISTRIBUTED-PER-SAINT-SPECIALIZED-ANNUAL-ZIYARA-MAAROUF-LIFE-EVENT-AHOUACH-COLLECTIVE-CONTEXT-GATING: LLM context-gating mechanism with (1) 7-saint distributed specialist H_7: 7 expert modules (healing/fertility/protection/etc); query-domain selects expert; (2) annual ziyara cycle Z_7day: 7-day periodic activation visits each expert sequence; long-cycle refresh; (3) per-saint context-gate G_saint: gate fires only on saint-specialization match; otherwise dormant; (4) maârouf life-event gate M_maarouf: life-event tokens activate maârouf-rite handler with sacrificial-cost penalty + communal-meal context-merge; (5) ahouach collective-dance A_ahou: post-ceremony all experts re-synchronize via collective-attention layer. Differs from R511, R524, R536 SHIMENAWA, R549 KAPU-NOA, R561 SABANTUY (pre-sowing seasonal gate + 5-event + batyr + ram + matchmaking) by 7-saint + ziyara + per-saint gate + maârouf + ahouach.
llm_application: BERBER-ZERDA-7-MARABOUT-DISTRIBUTED-ZIYARA-MAAROUF-AHOUACH LLM mechanism + 7-saint H_7 + annual Z_7day cycle + per-saint G_saint + maârouf M_maarouf + ahouach A_ahou. Differs from R511. R524. R536. R549. R561 SABANTUY (closest — pre-sowing seasonal gate + 5-event arena + batyr + ram + matchmaking). Differs from ICLR 2026 + Modern Arch + Big Arch Comparison + Anatomy Newer LLMs by 7-saint + ziyara + per-saint gate + maârouf + ahouach. Differs by 7-SAINT DISTRIBUTED + ANNUAL ZIYARA + PER-SAINT GATE + MAAROUF LIFE-EVENT + AHOUACH COLLECTIVE.
novelty_claim: ICLR 2026 + Modern Arch + Big Arch Comparison + Anatomy Newer LLMs cover modern arch + GQA paradigm. BERBER-ZERDA-7-MARABOUT-ZIYARA-MAAROUF-AHOUACH adds (a) 7-saint + (b) ziyara cycle + (c) per-saint gate + (d) maârouf + (e) ahouach. Recombination — borderline lookup.
